issues.description: The [Main] effect is mapped to 'Activated' trigger, but there is no cost representation for 'DON!! −1'. The DSL should include a cost field to represent returning 1 DON!! card.
The KO action target is missing the 'count' field. The text says 'up to 1', which should be explicitly encoded as count: 1.
The second effect with 'Trigger' trigger appears to be spurious. The official text only mentions a [Main] effect with DON!! -1 cost, not a separate Trigger effect that gives DON!!.
